arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Derby County Live: Kick-off time, team news and score updates
arts.sum: Follow all the action from Cardiff City Stadium as the Bluebirds take on Derby County

arts.ttl: The New Saints Women vs. Cardiff City Women
arts.sum: Ahead of the clash, head coach Iain Darbyshire said: "Part of the reason we've been so successful in the past few years is that we’ve had competition in every single position and the players don't get complacent. I think that's our challenge, credit to them and what they've done this year and they'll be coming into the game full of confidence, but for us, it's about doing the right thing in the right way, ensuring that everyone contributes through the game and executes the game plan and if we do that, we’ll have a good chance of coming away with a positive result.

Barry Town United equalised through Ingrid Aadland, whose long distance shot was out of reach for City goalkeeper Ceryn Chamberlain to draw the hosts level. Minutes later Fiona Barry gave City the lead again, her shot took a deflection and hit the back of the net to make it two for the Bluebirds.

arts.ttl: Derby County receive huge boost as injury update issued ahead of Cardiff City
arts.sum: Riza, when speaking to the media, confirmed Ramsey returned to training this week, but the Derby game is too soon: "It’s brilliant for Aaron. He’s had a few upsets in respect of his injuries, so it’s nice to see him back on the pitch training, even a little bit earlier than I thought.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne reveals Derby County transfer truth as David Clowes green lights deal
arts.sum: Asked about the transfer state of play ahead of Derby’s Championship clash with Cardiff City on Saturday (3pm), Warne said: “I think we’re progressing really well. Amid links to Fraulo, Warne continued: “We do have foreign targets, whether we press on any of them I don’t know.
